SEARCH
Package com.tngtech.archunit.core.domain

Class JavaClass.Functions

java.lang.Object
com.tngtech.archunit.core.domain.JavaClass.Functions
Enclosing class:
JavaClass
@PublicAPI(usage=ACCESS) public static final class JavaClass.Functions extends Object
Predefined functions to transform JavaClass. Note that due to inheritance further functions for JavaClass can be found in the following locations:
  • HasName.Functions
  • HasName.AndFullName.Functions
  • JavaType.Functions
